summary: Frontend-only verification of Google/Apple Pay wallet gating on /checkout. All 4 acceptance scenarios pass: (1) guest with empty passenger form shows [data-testid=wallet-locked-hint] with correct EN text and no checkout-wallet-btn; (2) partial fill (name, name+email) keeps the hint visible; (3) all 3 fields filled (fullName+email+phone) removes the hint; (4) i18n keys walletHint verified for EN/FR/RU (exact expected strings rendered); (5) authenticated user (seeded auth_token+user with intercepted /api/proxy/client/profile 200) sees logged-user-info banner, passenger-details-section is hidden, and wallet-locked-hint is absent — wallet is allowed unconditionally. checkout-wallet-btn container itself does not render in headless Chromium (no PaymentRequest support), which is expected and acceptable per the request note.
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout.js IIFE (lines 940-1035) correctly implements: early-return when !(selectedCar?.price > 0), guestReady = fullName && email && phone (all trimmed), walletAllowed = isAuthenticated || guestReady, else-branch renders locked-hint with c.walletHint.

onPaymentMethod handler (lines 957-1031) correctly prefers form values over wallet billing_details: nameToUse = form.fullName?.trim() || bd.name; emailToUse = form.email?.trim() || bd.email; phoneToUse = form.phone?.trim() || bd.phone. Guest auto-register+login uses these resolved values.
i18n walletHint present at lines 58 (en), 101 (fr), 144 (ru) and consumed via {c.walletHint || 'Fill your Full name...'} at line 947.
Minor: file Checkout.js is 1274 lines — consider splitting UnifiedCheckoutForm into its own module for maintainability (non-blocking).
seed_data_creation: Seeded sessionStorage.zont_booking with valid searchData (date=2026-06-15, time=10:30) + selectedCar(price=65). For auth flow, seeded localStorage.auth_token + user, and Playwright route-intercepted /api/proxy/client/profile with 200 to bypass AuthContext's 401 auto-logout.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet gating feature verified end-to-end via DOM. Real Apple/Google Pay UI cannot be exercised in headless Chromium; checkout-wallet-btn container absence when wallet API is unsupported is expected. To simulate an authenticated user without hitting real backend, seed localStorage(auth_token, user) AND intercept **/api/proxy/client/profile with 200 (otherwise AuthContext logs the fake user out on 401).
rca of the issue: N/A — feature verification, no bug found.
